---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with documentation or CAD models
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots/CAD views**
If applicable, add screenshots or CAD views to help explain your problem.

**Environment details:**
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
 - Software: [e.g. Fusion 360 v2026, CloudCompare 2.14 beta]
 - File name/version: [e.g. `10-ENC-ASSY-v4.f3z`]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
